_comment: Post registry for Nawy LinkedIn EB Accelerator Dashboard. Add new posts here — the automation picks them up automatically on the next daily run.

_setup.LINKEDIN_ORG_ID: Set this as a GitHub Secret. Numeric only, e.g. 12345678. Find it at: linkedin.com/company/nawy → Admin View → Super Admin → URL contains the ID.
_setup.LINKEDIN_ACCESS_TOKEN: Set this as a GitHub Secret. Must have r_organization_social scope. Expires every 60 days — see README_AUTOMATION.md for renewal steps.
_setup.how_to_find_post_urn: Open the LinkedIn post → click the three-dot menu → Copy link. The URN is the last segment, e.g. urn:li:ugcPost:7123456789012345678. Paste the full URN below.

posts.caption: For real estate sales professionals ready for more

metrics._note: followers_gained and page_views are not available via API — update manually from screenshots
eng_rate marked carousel_inflated — swipe-clicks inflate this metric. Use reposts as true virality signal.
